inArchive.desc: When moving file(s) or folder(s) out of archive, delete the folder when it is empty. Note: The archive folder won't be deleted even if empty.
inArchive.title: In archive

inSource.desc: When archiving file(s) or folder(s), delete the parent folder when it is empty.
inSource.title: In source

overridePaths.desc: Modify the path that will be used in the archive. The original path will be set in a frontmatter key for the restoration command.
overridePaths.title: Override path
overridePaths.info:
> [!info] 

> It is possible to replace the destination path in the archive via the use of properties keys, via the syntax \`{{key}}\`. 
> If the key is missing, the default path will be used. 
> It is however possible to set a default value via the syntax \`{{key|default}}\`. 
The use of regex is completely possible (as well as replacement via \`$1\` for example) by adding regex flags.
> Key's transformation are possible by following the [syntax](todo) 

Note that the replacement are done in the order of the list. 

It is possible to use the special keys \`{{size}}\`, \`{{mtime}}\` and \`{{ctime}}\` which are based on the stats of the source file/folder note. 

The format of these keys is in ISO, but it is possible to format them via the "Date format" field below.

folderNote.title: Folder note
folderNote.desc:
If the source is a folder, the path replacement will be based on a folder note for the original path saving and the frontmatter key.

If disabled, they won't be any replacement for folders path.

behavior.title: Folder note behavior
behavior.desc: Une folder note peut se trouver à la racine du dossier source, à son extérieur ou à l'intérieur avec un nom spécifique (index.md par exemple).
behavior.named: Inside the source folder with a specific name (index.md)

named.title: Folder note name
named.desc: Le nom du fichier de la folder note à l'intérieur du dossier source. Par défaut index.md

error.all_other: Failed to move {{- count}} files. Check the console for more informations.
